summary: ReAssure 2.0 is a comprehensive health insurance product offering coverage for in-patient care including AYUSH treatments, with variants Bronze and Gold, base sum insured options from 5 Lacs to 100 Lacs, and features like ReAssureX unlimited coverage and Booster+ carry forward benefits.
coverage: In-patient Care (including AYUSH) - Covered up to Sum Insured
Pre-Hospitalisation - 60 Days, Covered up to Sum Insured
Post-Hospitalisation - 180 Days, Covered up to Sum Insured
Modern Treatments - Covered up to Sum Insured
Road Ambulance - Covered up to Sum Insured
Air Ambulance - up to INR 2,50,000 per Hospitalisation
Home Care/Domiciliary - Covered up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor - Covered up to Sum Insured

Annual Health Checkup (Day 1) - For defined list of tests; up to INR 500 for every INR 1 Lac Base Sum Insured (Individual: Maximum INR 5,000 per Insured; Family Floater: Maximum INR 10,000 per policy)
ReAssureX ReAssure Forever - First claim paid triggers ReAssure Forever. It is unlimited. Each Claim under ReAssure Forever will be up to Base Sum Insured
Second Medical Opinion - Once for any condition in a Policy Year
Shared Accommodation - Up to INR 15 Lac Base Sum Insured: INR 800 per day; Maximum INR 4,800. Above INR 15 Lac Base Sum Insured: INR 1,000 per day; Maximum INR 6,000
room_rent: Shared Accommodation: Up to INR 15 Lac Base Sum Insured: INR 800 per day; Maximum INR 4,800
Shared Accommodation: Above INR 15 Lac Base Sum Insured: INR 1,000 per day; Maximum INR 6,000
co_pay: A co-payment of 20% would apply if treatment taken in a non-Tiered Network Hospital
claims_information: Niva Bupa processes pre-authorisation requests within 30 minutes for all active policies, subject to receiving all documents and information(s) up to Niva Bupa's satisfaction
The above commitment does not include pre-authorisation settlement at the time of discharge or system outage
Available only on cashless with network provider

faqs.question: What is the product name and UIN?
faqs.answer: The product name is ReAssure 2.0 and the Product UIN is NBHHLIP26042V022526.

faqs.question: What are the available variants?
faqs.answer: The available variants are Bronze and Gold.

faqs.question: What are the base sum insured options?
faqs.answer: Base Sum Insured options are 5 Lacs, 7.5 Lacs, 10 Lacs, 15 Lacs, 20 Lacs, 25 Lacs, 50 Lacs, and 100 Lacs.

faqs.question: Is AYUSH treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, In-patient Care including AYUSH is covered up to Sum Insured. Minimum 24 hours of hospitalisation is required for AYUSH treatment in an AYUSH Hospital.

faqs.question: What is the pre-hospitalisation coverage period?
faqs.answer: Pre-Hospitalisation is covered for 60 Days up to Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is the post-hospitalisation coverage period?
faqs.answer: Post-Hospitalisation is covered for 180 Days up to Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What ambulance coverage is provided?
faqs.answer: Road Ambulance is covered up to Sum Insured and Air Ambulance is covered up to INR 2,50,000 per Hospitalisation.

faqs.question: What is ReAssureX ReAssure Forever?
faqs.answer: ReAssureX ReAssure Forever is triggered when the first claim is paid. It is unlimited and each claim under ReAssure Forever will be up to Base Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is Booster+ 3X benefit?
faqs.answer: Booster+ 3X means unutilised Base Sum Insured carries forward to the next policy year, maximum up to 3 times.

faqs.question: What is Booster+ 10X benefit?
faqs.answer: Booster+ 10X means unutilized Base Sum Insured carries forward to the next policy year, maximum up to 10 times.

faqs.question: What is the Live Healthy benefit?
faqs.answer: Live Healthy provides up to 30% discount on premium at the time of Renewal.

faqs.question: What are the shared accommodation limits?
faqs.answer: For up to INR 15 Lac Base Sum Insured: INR 800 per day with Maximum INR 4,800. For above INR 15 Lac Base Sum Insured: INR 1,000 per day with Maximum INR 6,000.

faqs.question: How many times can I get a second medical opinion?
faqs.answer: Second Medical Opinion is available once for any condition in a Policy Year.

faqs.question: Is e-consultation available?
faqs.answer: Yes, unlimited e-consultation is available within the network.

faqs.question: What is included in the Annual Health Checkup?
faqs.answer: Annual Health Checkup is available from Day 1 for defined list of tests, up to INR 500 for every INR 1 Lac Base Sum Insured with maximum INR 5,000 per Insured for Individual and INR 10,000 per policy for Family Floater.

faqs.question: What is Safeguard optional benefit?
faqs.answer: Safeguard includes Claim Safeguard (Non-payable items covered as per list I of Annexure I), Booster+ Safeguard (No impact on Booster+ if claim is less than INR 50,000), and Sum Insured Safeguard (CPI linked increase in Base Sum Insured).

faqs.question: What is Safeguard+ optional benefit?
faqs.answer: Safeguard+ includes Claim Safeguard+ (Non-payable items covered as per list I, II, III, IV of Annexure I), Booster+ Safeguard+ (No impact on Booster+ if claim is less than INR 1,00,000), and Sum Insured Safeguard+ (CPI linked increase in Base Sum Insured).

faqs.question: What is the Personal Accident Add-On?
faqs.answer: Personal Accident Add-On offers 15% discount on Premium and you can choose from 1X/2X/3X/4X/5X of base sum insured with maximum up to INR 1 Crore.

faqs.question: What is the co-payment for non-Tiered Network Hospital?
faqs.answer: A co-payment of 20% would apply if treatment is taken in a non-Tiered Network Hospital.

faqs.question: How fast is the cashless claim processing?
faqs.answer: Niva Bupa processes pre-authorisation requests within 30 minutes for all active policies, subject to receiving all documents and information up to satisfaction.

faqs.question: How many network hospitals are available?
faqs.answer: There are 10,000+ network hospitals available.

faqs.question: Is customer service available 24x7?
faqs.answer: Yes, 24X7 Customer Service is available.

faqs.question: What is the customer helpline number?
faqs.answer: The Customer Helpline No. is 1860-500-8888.

faqs.question: What is the company's registered office address?
faqs.answer: The registered office address is C-98, First Floor, Lajpat Nagar, Part 1, New Delhi-110024.

faqs.question: What is the IRDAI registration number?
faqs.answer: The IRDAI Registration No. is 145.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Live Healthy benefit?
faqs.answer: Eligible insured person for this benefit will be all members except son/daughter under a Family Floater policy and any member of age at least 18 years under an Individual policy.

faqs.question: Does the 30-minute processing commitment include discharge settlement?
faqs.answer: No, the 30-minute commitment does not include pre-authorisation settlement at the time of discharge or system outage.

faqs.question: Is the Annual Health Checkup available from Day 1?
faqs.answer: Yes, Annual Health Checkup is available from Day 1 for defined list of tests.

faqs.question: What is the website for more information?
faqs.answer: The website is www.nivabupa.com.

faqs.question: How many lives are covered by Niva Bupa?
faqs.answer: Niva Bupa covers 2 Crore+ Lives.
